title: Find a motorcycle instructor training provider
body: "Overview  This page lists training providers that offer structured training courses for motorcycle instructors.  These training courses can help you develop teaching skills and prepare you for the DVSA:   compulsory basic training (CBT) instructor assessment direct access scheme (DAS) instructor assessments   They are not a replacement for the official DVSA qualifications.  DVSA does not endorse any specific provider. Being included on this list does not guarantee quality of training.  Check with training providers that any course is right for you before booking.  Get added to this list  Training providers can be added to this list if they provide a course that:   is based on the national standard for driver and rider training  is specifically designed for motorcycle instructors has a clear structure with defined learning outcomes   Email DVSA to apply to be added to the list. Your email must include:   details of the course offered website and contact information a description of how the course specifically supports motorcycle instruction any other related information such as whether the course offers an Award in Education and Training (AET) qualification    DVSA CBT team cbt@dvsa.gov.uk   DVSA will review the information you provide to make sure it meets the criteria before  adding you to the list.   DVSA can remove training providers from the list if their approved training body (ATB) does not meet the standards set out by DVSA.   Current providers   Edinburgh Motorcycle Training Offers: CBT, DAS and ERS instructor training edinburghmotorcycletraining.com edinburghmotorcycletraining@gmail.com Telephone: 01721 728398 Find out about call charges    Fast-Trak Essential Driver Training Offers: Level 5 Award in CBT, DAS and ERS Instructor Training livingyourdreams.co.uk dpft@aol.com Telephone: 01743 460460  Find out about call charges    Pass Bike Offers: Level 3 Award in Education and Motorcycle Instructor Training passbike.co.uk info@passbike.co.uk Telephone: 01702 619423 Find out about call charges    Phoenix Motorcycle Training Ltd Offers: Level 3 Award in Motorcycle Instructor Training phoenixmotorcycletraining.co.uk bookings@teachmetoride.co.uk Telephone: 0330 223 4000 Find out about call charges   "

taxons.title: Driving, motorcycle and LGV instructor qualification process
